title: Stock Ticker Symbol
notes: The exchange ticker symbol identifying a publicly traded security (e.g. 'UBER', 'UPWK').

title: Fiscal Period End Date
notes: The last calendar date of the fiscal period covered by the filing.

title: SEC Filing Date
notes: The date on which the filing was submitted to the SEC EDGAR system.

title: Fiscal Year
notes: The four-digit fiscal year to which the filing belongs.

title: SEC Form Type
notes: The SEC filing form type. '10-K' is the annual report; '10-Q' is the quarterly report.

title: Fiscal Period
notes: The fiscal period covered by the filing. 'FY' denotes the full fiscal year; 'Q1'–'Q3' denote the first through third fiscal quarters.

title: Diluted Earnings Per Share
notes: Net income attributable to common shareholders divided by the weighted-average diluted share count for the fiscal period, as reported in the SEC filing.

title: Net Income (Loss)
notes: The company's total net income or net loss for the fiscal period, as reported in the SEC filing. Negative values indicate a net loss.

title: Shares Outstanding
notes: The total number of common shares outstanding as of the fiscal period end date, as reported in the SEC filing.

title: Net Worth (Shareholders' Equity)
notes: Total shareholders' equity (assets minus liabilities) as of the fiscal period end date, as reported in the SEC filing.
